hintDisplay: Sujeto: nosotros (un grupo de primos) / Verbo: viajar / Complemento: juntos a la playa / Tiempo: el verano pasado

correctSentence: We cousins traveled together to the beach last summer.

correctSentence: My siblings argued about who would wash the dishes yesterday.
